approveDialog.title: Approve {{username}}
approveDialog.description: Select a role for this user before approving their registration.

rejectDialog.title: Reject User
rejectDialog.description: Are you sure you want to reject the registration for "{{username}}"? This will deny their access to the system.

deactivateDialog.title: Deactivate User
deactivateDialog.description: Are you sure you want to deactivate "{{username}}"? They will no longer be able to log in.

userCreate.title: Create User
userCreate.description: Add a new user to the system.

userDelete.title: Delete User
userDelete.description: Are you sure you want to delete user "{{username}}"? This action cannot be undone. Their datasets will be preserved but will show "Deleted user" as the creator.

export.errorBody: Something went wrong. Try again or narrow your date range.

ai.title: AI
ai.sendSampleValuesDescription: Include sample data values in LLM prompts for better AI results. Disable for privacy-sensitive datasets.
ai.semanticSearchDescription: Enable vector-based similarity search alongside keyword search
ai.backfillPartial: Generated {{created}} embeddings with {{errors}} failures — check embedding model configuration
ai.backfillAllFailed: All {{errors}} embeddings failed — check that OPENAI_API_KEY is set and the embedding model is available
ai.apiKeysEnvOnlyNote: API keys can only be set via environment variables (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY) and cannot be changed from this page. All other AI settings below are admin-overridable.
ai.providerDescription: Select the LLM provider for chat, map generation, and metadata AI features.
ai.modelDescription: Model identifier sent to the selected provider. Must match an available model.
ai.baseUrlDescription: Custom endpoint for OpenAI-compatible providers (Ollama, Groq, Together, etc.). Leave empty for default OpenAI.
ai.embeddingModelDescription: OpenAI-compatible embedding model name for semantic search vectors.
ai.embeddingBaseUrlDescription: Separate endpoint for embedding generation. Falls back to the inference base URL if empty.
ai.embeddingDimsAutoDescription: Vector dimensions output by the embedding model. Use Detect to auto-probe, or enter manually.
ai.dimsDetectFailed: Could not detect dimensions. Check that OPENAI_API_KEY is set and the embedding model is valid.
ai.dimsChangeWarning: Changing dimensions will make {{count}} existing embedding(s) incompatible. You will need to regenerate all embeddings after saving.
ai.openaiKeyRequired: OPENAI_API_KEY is not set. Embedding generation requires an OpenAI-compatible API key, even when using Anthropic for inference.

revokeDialog.title: Revoke API Key
revokeDialog.description: Are you sure you want to revoke '{{name}}'? This key will immediately stop working.

apiKeyReveal.title: API Key Created
apiKeyReveal.description: Copy this key now. It will not be shown again.
apiKeyReveal.warning: This key will not be shown again. Make sure to copy it now.

sharedMaps.title: Published Maps
sharedMaps.empty: No maps have been published yet.
sharedMaps.creator: Creator

shareTokens.revokeDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to revoke the share link for "{{map}}"? Anyone with this link will lose access.

embedTokens.bulkRevokeDescription: Revoke {{count}} embed tokens? This cannot be undone. Embedded maps using these tokens will lose tile access.

unsaved.title: Unsaved changes
unsaved.description: You have unsaved settings that will be lost if you leave.

sourceBadge.envVarTooltip: Locked by environment variable. Change it in your deployment config.

permissions.title: Role Permissions
permissions.description: Configure which capabilities are available to each role. Admin manage_users and manage_settings permissions cannot be disabled.

envOnly.title: Configuration locked to environment variables
envOnly.description: Set ENV_ONLY_CONFIG=false to enable admin overrides.

general.title: General
general.registrationDescription: Allow new users to create accounts. Accounts still require admin approval.
general.aiFeaturesDescription: Enable AI-powered features including dataset metadata drafting (summaries, keywords, lineage, quality statements), map builder chat, and AI map generation.
general.requireMetadataDescription: When enabled, datasets must have complete metadata (title, summary, contacts, keywords, license, spatial extent, CRS, lineage) before they can be published.
general.publicAppUrlDescription: The browser-facing GeoLens URL. Use the frontend origin without the /api suffix.
general.publicApiUrlDescription: The externally reachable API base. Leave it aligned with your app URL + /api for path-based deployments.
general.logJsonDescription: Output logs in structured JSON format.

basemaps.title: Basemaps
basemaps.presetsDescription: Enable or disable built-in basemap options.
basemaps.customDescription: Add custom XYZ/TMS tile URLs or MapLibre GL style JSON URLs.
basemaps.apiKeyHelp: Use {api_key} in the tile URL as a placeholder. The key is interpolated server-side.
basemaps.urlError: URL must contain {z}/{x}/{y} placeholders, end with .json, or contain /styles/

mapDefaults.title: Map Defaults
mapDefaults.cardDescription: Set the initial center and zoom for all map views.

widgets.title: Map Widgets
widgets.description: Enable or disable widgets available in the map builder.

branding.title: Branding
branding.description: Control the visibility of GeoLens branding across the application

network.globalRateLimitDescription: Maximum API requests per second per IP address. Tile requests are excluded from this limit.
network.corsAllowedOriginsDescription: Comma-separated origins. Use * for any origin.

security.title: Security
security.cardDescription: Control the maximum number of login attempts per minute per IP address.
security.tokenLifetimeNote: Token lifetime changes apply to newly issued tokens only.
security.loginRateLimitDescription: Maximum number of login requests allowed per minute from a single IP address (1–1000).

uploads.title: Upload Settings
uploads.cardDescription: Configure maximum file size and allowed file extensions for dataset uploads.
uploads.maxSizeMbDescription: Maximum upload file size in megabytes (1-10,000). Changes take effect on the next upload without restart.
uploads.allowedExtensionsDescription: Comma-separated list of allowed file extensions (e.g. .zip,.gpkg,.geojson,.json,.csv,.tif,.tiff,.xlsx,.xls).
uploads.tileCacheTtlDescription: Time in seconds before tile cache entries expire (0 = no cache).

oauth.title: OAuth Providers
oauth.description: Configure external identity providers for single sign-on.
oauth.emptyState: No OAuth providers configured. Click "Add Provider" to get started.
oauth.addDescription: Configure a new OAuth provider for single sign-on.
oauth.tenantIdHint: Your Azure AD tenant ID. The discovery URL will be constructed automatically.
oauth.slugHint: URL-safe identifier used in OAuth callback URLs.
oauth.groupClaimHint: JWT claim containing user group memberships for automatic role mapping.
oauth.groupRoleMappingHint: Maps IdP group names to GeoLens roles. JSON object format.
oauth.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? Users who signed in with this provider will no longer be able to authenticate through it.
oauth.invalidJson: Group role mapping must be valid JSON

saml.metadataXmlPlaceholder: Paste your Identity Provider's SAML metadata XML here
saml.metadataXmlDescription: Paste the metadata XML from your Identity Provider. The entity ID, SSO URL, and signing certificate will be extracted automatically.
saml.spFieldDescription: Provide this value to your Identity Provider
saml.invalidMetadata: Invalid metadata XML. Ensure you paste the complete XML document from your Identity Provider.
